classification_notes: Dairy-coded foods are treated as animal-derived protein.
Meat-centered food codes are treated as animal-derived protein.
Egg food codes are treated as animal-derived protein.
Legume and nut food codes are treated as plant-derived protein.
Grain-coded foods are treated as plant-derived protein unless a richer mapping is added later.
Fruit-coded foods are treated as plant-derived protein.
Vegetable-coded foods are treated as plant-derived protein.
These foods are typically low-protein or source-ambiguous and remain unclassified.
These foods mix plant and animal ingredients and remain unclassified in the initial seed.
